entries.description: Default all-rounder for premium frontend output without forcing one narrow visual style.
GPT/Codex-oriented premium frontend skill with stricter layout, motion, and anti-slop rules.
Image-first frontend reference skill: generate premium website images, analyze them, then implement faithfully.
Upgrade existing websites and apps by auditing current UI, then improving layout, hierarchy, and polish.
Soft, expensive-looking UI direction with calmer contrast, generous whitespace, premium fonts, and smooth motion.
Complete-output enforcement for frontend work: no skipped steps, placeholder comments, or abridged implementation.
Minimalist editorial product UI with restrained palettes, clean typography, and crisp structure.
Industrial brutalist UI direction with Swiss typography, mechanical structure, high contrast, and tactical visual language.
Google Stitch-compatible semantic design rules with upstream DESIGN.md export guidance.
Dedicated image-generation-first workflow for premium, implementation-friendly website design references.
